gold.title: FAQ
gold.reason: Full FAQ section with gradient text title, Framer Motion animated entrance, contact prompt CTA, and shadcn Button — complete, premium, drop-in marketing block.

gold.title: Vertical Accordion
gold.reason: Animated vertical accordion with react-icons, Framer Motion, and responsive window size hook — highly visual, ideal for feature/service showcases.

gold.title: FAQ Chat Accordion
gold.reason: Chat-bubble style FAQ with icon positioning, Framer Motion, Radix UI, and Plus/Minus icons — unique visual pattern that makes FAQ sections memorable.

gold.title: Scroll Faqaccordion
gold.reason: GSAP ScrollTrigger + Framer Motion combined with Radix accordion — scroll-driven reveal makes this the most impressive FAQ interaction pattern in the set.

gold.title: FAQ Accordion
gold.reason: Full block with Badge, Card, HelpCircle/MessageCircle icons, Framer Motion, and contact CTA — polished, layout-complete FAQ section for landing pages.

gold.title: Icon Accordion
gold.reason: Feature-icon accordion (Eye, Bell, BarChart, Monitor) with Framer Motion AnimatePresence and multi-open state — perfect for product feature sections.

gold.title: Animated Project Cards
gold.reason: Accordion-as-project-cards with status badges, categories, pricing, and Framer Motion expand — visually rich, great for portfolio or marketplace sections.

gold.title: Interactive Accordion
gold.reason: Numbered items (01, 02...) with Framer Motion AnimatePresence and design-agency content — modern editorial style ideal for process/services sections.

gold.title: Faq Tabs
gold.reason: Categorized FAQ combining tabs and accordion with Framer Motion — dual-navigation pattern is uniquely suited for large FAQ or help-center sections.

gold.title: Accordion
gold.reason: Framer Motion blur+opacity+height animation on content reveal — the blur-to-clear effect is a premium detail not seen in standard accordions.

gold.title: Text Reveal Faqs
gold.reason: Framer Motion text reveal animation on FAQ answers with link support — elegant entrance effect makes FAQ content feel editorial and high-end.

gold.title: Accordion
gold.reason: Full Framer Motion variant/transition API with context-driven expand, customizable animation variants — the most composable and visually tunable accordion in the set.

gold.title: Accordion 03
gold.reason: Image-per-item accordion with Button CTA inside content — rich media accordion ideal for portfolio, team, or product showcase sections.

gold.title: Faqsection
gold.reason: Complete FAQ section component with title, subtitle, description, and button CTA — well-structured, ready to drop into any marketing page.

gold.title: Accordion
gold.reason: Neobrutalism-styled accordion — strong visual identity with bold borders and offset shadows, stands out from every generic FAQ component.

silver.title: Accordion
silver.reason: Radix UI accordion with full accessibility, single/multiple modes, and good description — solid primitive but no visual differentiation.

silver.title: Accordion 1
silver.reason: CVA-based multi-variant accordion (default, outline, solid, ghost) with ChevronDown — good reusability and clean abstraction.

silver.title: Accordion 1
silver.reason: Custom accordion with Framer Motion AnimatePresence, allowMultiple, defaultExpandedIds — functional and animated but visually plain.

silver.title: Accordion - Cheveron
silver.reason: Rounded-2xl border-dotted container with DIcons chevron — distinctive border styling gives it a subtle premium feel.

silver.title: Accordion - Plus - Minus
silver.reason: Same dotted-border container as accordion-01 but with Plus/Minus toggle icons via DIcons — clean visual variant worth including.

silver.title: Accordion 04
silver.reason: X/Plus icon toggle with numbered IDs — clean minimal style with good visual structure.

silver.title: Accordion 05
silver.reason: PlusIcon toggle with clean layout and numbered items — functional, readable, suitable for content-dense FAQ sections.

silver.title: Faq Accordion
silver.reason: HelpCircle and MessageCircle icon headers with custom Radix accordion wrapper — distinct iconography elevates a standard FAQ pattern.

silver.title: Accordian
silver.reason: Feature icons (Info, Settings, Code, Accessibility) per item with Plus/Minus Framer Motion toggle — icon-per-item pattern is practical and clean.

silver.title: Multi Accordion
silver.reason: Context-driven accordion with Framer Motion AnimatePresence, compound component pattern — well-architected and reusable.

silver.title: Ruixen Accordian02
silver.reason: Two-column layout with left header and right accordion — useful split-layout pattern for FAQ sections on wide screens.

silver.title: Accordion
silver.reason: Hash-based deep-linking, auto-open on navigation, keyboard support — excellent for docs but visually minimal.

silver.title: Accordion
silver.reason: Ark UI with Framer Motion AnimatePresence and shadow-lg card container — animated and styled, good quality but not distinctive.

silver.title: FAQ 1
silver.reason: Clean FAQ block with heading and typed props — simple but complete and ready-to-use for basic landing pages.

silver.title: Faqs 1
silver.reason: Structured FAQ section with heading, subheading, and max-width layout — minimal but complete for standard FAQ blocks.

silver.title: Disclosure
silver.reason: Framer Motion MotionConfig disclosure with variant system and context — clean primitive suitable for non-FAQ use cases like tooltips or inline help.

silver.title: Accordion 02 1
silver.reason: Rich content grid layout inside accordion panels with images and Button CTA — interesting pattern but Plus/Minus icon and complex content may be too specific.

silver.title: Accordion
silver.reason: CVA multi-variant (default, outline, solid, ghost) with Chevron and Plus icon options — high reusability, good developer ergonomics.

silver.title: Accordion 1
silver.reason: Same CVA multi-variant pattern on Radix Accordion — solid utility component with well-structured variants.

silver.title: FAQ Accordion
silver.reason: Already Gold — duplicate omitted.

silver.title: Accordion
silver.reason: Enhanced shadcn accordion with @radix-ui/react-icons ChevronDown — modest improvement over base, clean and usable.

silver.title: Accordion Space
silver.reason: Icon + colored badge per accordion item with textColor/bgColor config — adds visual hierarchy without heavy animation.

silver.title: Default
silver.reason: Same icon+color pattern as accordion-space — reusable with configurable icon/color per item, practical for feature lists.

bronze.title: Accordion
bronze.reason: Unmodified shadcn/ui accordion primitive — the baseline, no visual upgrade whatsoever.

bronze.title: Accordion 1
bronze.reason: Shadcn accordion used as a direct import with FAQ content — no customization beyond the base component.

bronze.title: Accordion 1
bronze.reason: Subframe-specific component with proprietary @subframe/core dependency — not reusable outside Subframe ecosystem.

bronze.title: Accordion 1
bronze.reason: Ark UI accordion with ChevronDown — plain wrapper, no animation or styling beyond defaults.

bronze.title: Accordion 1
bronze.reason: Raw Base UI accordion component wrapper — minimal Tailwind, no animation, nearly identical to the shadcn base.

bronze.title: Accordion 1
bronze.reason: Shadcn accordion with ArrowUpRight icon on header — cosmetic tweak only, no meaningful visual upgrade.

bronze.title: Accordion
bronze.reason: Base UI accordion wrapper with ChevronDown — thin wrapper around a primitive, no visual differentiation.

bronze.title: Accordion 01 1
bronze.reason: Shadcn accordion with Plus icon from @aliimam/icons — near-identical to the base with a minor icon swap.

bronze.title: Accordion
bronze.reason: Raw Base UI Accordion.Root with inline Tailwind — functional but no animation, no styling beyond border lines.

bronze.title: Discussion
bronze.reason: Accordion used as a thread/discussion UI with left border line — too app-specific (comment threads), not suitable for website redesign.

bronze.title: Base Accordion
bronze.reason: CVA variants on Base UI accordion — same pattern as sean0205__accordion but less tested library; functional but redundant.

bronze.title: Outline Accordion
bronze.reason: File contains a counter component (useState count), not an accordion — mislabeled, completely wrong component.

bronze.title: Collapse
bronze.reason: Custom collapse with size variants (small/large) and CollapseGroup — bare-bones, no animation, minimal styling.

bronze.title: Accordion Multi Level
bronze.reason: Nested accordion+collapsible for file tree UI — too app-specific (file explorer pattern), not suitable for marketing sections.

bronze.title: Shadcn Accordion
bronze.reason: File contains a date picker / calendar form, not an accordion — mislabeled, wrong component entirely.

bronze.title: Flip Card
bronze.reason: Flip card component — not an accordion at all, misclassified in this category.

bronze.title: Particles Bg
bronze.reason: Canvas particle background — not an accordion, completely misclassified.

bronze.title: Share Button
bronze.reason: Social share button with Facebook/Twitter/LinkedIn links — not an accordion, wrong category.

bronze.title: Siri Orb
bronze.reason: Animated Siri-style orb component — not an accordion, completely misclassified.

bronze.title: Text Swiper
bronze.reason: Gradient badge and text swiper animation — not an accordion, misclassified.

bronze.title: Background Plus
bronze.reason: Plus-pattern CSS background component — not an accordion, misclassified.

bronze.title: Bg Gredient
bronze.reason: Radial gradient background component — not an accordion, misclassified.

bronze.title: Blue Meshy Background
bronze.reason: WebGL/canvas mesh background — not an accordion, misclassified.
